name: Boys and Girls Club
description: Come play pickleball at Boys and Girls Club in Winnemucca, NV! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Boys & Girls Club of Winnemucca
description: Boys & Girls Club of Winnemucca is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Winnemucca, NV. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
